accounts.name: vault
docs: The vault token account that holds the governance tokens for sale.

accounts.name: buyer_token_account
docs: The buyer's token account that will receive the purchased tokens.

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: You are not authorized to perform this action.

errors.name: DaoPaused
errors.msg: The DAO is currently paused for emergency maintenance.

errors.name: InvalidProposal
errors.msg: The referenced proposal is not valid.

errors.name: ProposalClosed
errors.msg: The proposal is closed and no longer accepts changes or votes.

errors.name: ProposalAlreadyActive
errors.msg: The proposal is already in an active state.

errors.name: VotingPeriodNotEnded
errors.msg: The proposal voting period has not yet ended.

errors.name: TitleTooLong
errors.msg: The proposal title exceeds the maximum allowed length.

errors.name: DescriptionTooLong
errors.msg: The proposal description exceeds the maximum allowed length.

errors.name: QuadraticVotingDisabled
errors.msg: Quadratic voting is not enabled for this DAO or proposal.

errors.name: AlreadyVoted
errors.msg: You have already cast a vote on this proposal.

errors.name: VoteNotFound
errors.msg: No vote record found for this voter on this proposal.

errors.name: InsufficientTokens
errors.msg: You do not have sufficient tokens to perform this action.

errors.name: InsufficientFunds
errors.msg: The requested withdrawal amount exceeds the available treasury balance.

errors.name: InvalidMint
errors.msg: The token mint does not match the expected governance token mint.

errors.name: VoterBanned
errors.msg: This voter account is banned and cannot perform actions.
